assertions.description: INCORRECT: The four unrouted nets (unconnected ProMicro1 pads 2, 5, 6, 7) each list the same pad identifier five times: e.g., pads=['ProMicro1.2', 'ProMicro1.2', 'ProMicro1.2', 'ProMicro1.2', 'ProMicro1.2']. This occurs because the 'Promicro-Jumpers:ProMicro_facedown' footprint has pad_count=242 — a reversible footprint where each logical pin maps to multiple physical copper pads (5 pads per pin for the jumper/castellated variant). The pad de-duplication logic in the PCB analyzer is not handling multi-pad-per-pin footprints correctly, leading to repeated pad references that overcount the physical connections.
